name: Krumkaker
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a stationary or hand-held mixer, beat together the sugar, eggs, and vanilla until the mixture is light and airy.
2. Melt the butter and let it cool. Sift the cardamom and flour together.
3. Mix the cornstarch and water until smooth.
4. With the mixer on low speed, alternately add the butter and flour to the sugar-egg mixture. Beat in the cornstarch mixture.
5. Pour a spoonful of batter onto a heated krumkaker iron, press shut, and bake the cookie until golden on each side.
6. Drape around a cone or in a cup until dry.
7. Serve with whipped cream that has cloud berries (multibaer) or raspberries whipped into it.
